title: Gaycraft
description: An optimized pack to play Gaycraft as it was intended :D
body:
# **LA GAYCRAFT 🏳️‍🌈**
## **Che Cos'è**
La Gaycraft è un server a plugin crossversion fra noi amici membri del nostro server discord, siamo amici con la volontà di creare unione tramite passioni comuni e satira, con poca censura e sostegno
## **Cos'è questo**
Questo è il pacchetto necessario per utilizzare il server in modo meno distraente e più ottimizzato, con supporto completo dei plugin e con ottimizzazione per dispositivi di fascia bassa e miglioramenti per quelli di fascia alta.

Eng:

# **LA GAYCRAFT 🏳️‍🌈**
## **What is it**
Gaycraft is a cross-version plugin server among us friends who are members of our Discord server. We are friends who want to create unity through shared passions and satire, with little censorship and support.
## **What is this**
This is the pack neccessary for experience the server in a less distracting and more optimized way, with plugin full support and with optimization for low-end devices and enhantments for higher-end.
## **What does it adds**
It adds several mods like sodium and iris for make minecraft performances better and some UI tweaks for playing Gaycraft server, it can also be used as a "Fabously Optimized" pack like in other worlds or single player, also, u can pet player and mobs
## **Why would i download it**
Idk, maybe u are a Gaycraft member, or you want a optimized pack, or you like the mood or you are bored
